'''鈭歯-p-f-ch''' ('''kanapfechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:filthen|filthen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-p-f-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:filthen|filthen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-p-f-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kanapfechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinapfechoko|thinapfechoko]] || [[word:jinapfechoko|jinapfechoko]] || [[word:shinapfechoko|shinapfechoko]] || [[word:kinapfechoko|kinapfechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunapfechoko|thuthunapfechoko]] || [[word:jujunapfechoko|jujunapfechoko]] || [[word:shushunapfechoko|shushunapfechoko]] || [[word:kukunapfechoko|kukunapfechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonapfechoko|thonapfechoko]] || [[word:jonapfechoko|jonapfechoko]] || [[word:shonapfechoko|shonapfechoko]] || [[word:konapfechoko|konapfechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙napfechoko|th忙napfechoko]] || [[word:j忙napfechoko|j忙napfechoko]] || [[word:sh忙napfechoko|sh忙napfechoko]] || [[word:k忙napfechoko|k忙napfechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
